Document:
# Outlaws
[textlink="View Full Wiki Page" link="https://ss14.misfitsystems.net/wiki/index.php/Outlaws"]
Raiders, bandits, and gang fighters who haunt the I-80 corridor. Khans, Jackals, Vipers, Gunners, and Fiends — each with their own methods. The Eighties have been here longer than anyone.
All Outlaw roles require [bold][color=#cc3333]whitelist[/color][/bold] and use the spawner system.
## The Gangs
[bold][color=#cc3333]The Eighties[/color][/bold] The most feared gang on the I-80 corridor. Named after the interstate itself. Cover vast territory, raid frontier towns, kidnapping. Know the terrain. They have been operating longer than anyone stationed at Wendover.
[bold][color=#a4885c]Khans[/color][/bold] The most organized. Structured crew valuing loyalty, territory, controlled aggression. Maintain supply lines, defend turf.
[bold][color=#888888]Jackals[/color][/bold] Fast-strike raiders. Prize speed and evasiveness. Hit supply convoys, loot, vanish.
[bold][color=#336699]Vipers[/color][/bold] Fear as weapon. Intimidation, ambush, psychological warfare.
[bold][color=#ffb000]Gunners[/color][/bold] Heavy-weapons specialists. Dig in, lay overwhelming fire, grind defenses to dust.
[bold][color=#993366]Fiends[/color][/bold] The most dangerous and unpredictable. Chem-fueled, aggressive, relentless. Attack without warning.
## Roles
[bold][color=#a4885c]Role[/color][/bold]
[bold][color=#a4885c]Description[/color][/bold]
[bold]Khan[/bold]
Organized raider. Keep your crew supplied, fight smart, hold your ground. Whitelist required.
[bold]Jackal[/bold]
Fast-strike raider. Hit convoys, take what you can carry, disappear. Whitelist required.
[bold]Viper[/bold]
Intimidation specialist. Break resistance before it forms. Whitelist required.
[bold]Gunner[/bold]
Heavy weapons. Pin targets, grind defenses, lay down fire. Whitelist required.
[bold]Fiend[/bold]
Chem-fueled chaos agent. Pressure, overwhelm, never stop. Whitelist required.
## Faction Relations
[bold][color=#a4885c]Faction[/color][/bold]
[bold][color=#a4885c]Standing[/color][/bold]
[bold][color=#a4885c]Notes[/color][/bold]
NCR
[color=#cc3333]Hostile[/color]
NCR is law and order
Brotherhood of Steel
[color=#cc3333]Hostile[/color]
Views raiders as vermin
Caesar's Legion
[color=#cc3333]Hostile[/color]
Legion conquers or destroys
Townsfolk
[color=#cc3333]Hostile[/color]
Towns are targets
Other Outlaws
[color=#ffb000]Uneasy[/color]
Cooperate when beneficial, betray when not
NPC Raiders
[color=#cc3333]Hostile[/color]
Player Outlaws hostile to NPC raider mobs
Outlaws are a [bold]war-capable[/bold] faction.
